title: Slack server combines secret env, unpinned npx, and external mutation

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/slack/README.md). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: This config layers three review-worthy surfaces at once — a bot-token secret, an unpinned npx package, and a server whose purpose is to post to Slack (external mutation) — so it is the richest non-blocking case in the corpus.
knownLimitations: Whether the bot can actually post is governed by Slack scopes the static scan cannot read.
